html:
Exclusive to:  

The Second-Hand Dentures has a 4.17% chance of being found when digging up a grave and can be traded to the Pig King for 2 Gold Nuggets.

The Second-Hand Dentures can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_10".

×2

×7

×3

Trivia

  • Under the old research method, Trinkets were one of the best ways of gaining research points (80 points).

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

:
Miscellaneous
"trinket_10"
Exclusive to:
“I hope I get out of here before I need these.”
–Wilson
“I don't think dentures don't burn well.”
–Willow
“Is pearly chompers!”
–Wolfgang
“Another mouth to feed.”
–Wendy
“STOP SMILING. IT’S GROSS”
–WX-78
“Don't need these yet: I've still got a few teeth left.”
–Wickerbottom
“Choppers for old folks.”
–Woodie
“These are gross, and that's the tooth.”
–Maxwell
“Has someone lost their dental work?”
–Wagstaff
“A töken öf victöry.”
–Wigfrid
“Just like what grandpa wears!”
–Webber
“I might need these if I ever take a gnarly wipeout.”
–Walani
“Manmade masticators.”
–Warly
“My prayers arrr answered!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS CLACKITY-CLACK”
–Wilba
“Chatters”
–Wormwood
“Treasures like this make the adventuring life worthwhile.”
–Wheeler
“All bite and no bark. Ha!”
–Winona
“Humans are so funny.”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee, such short stubby chompers.”
–Wurt
“I'm sure these will bring a smile to someone's face. Get it?”
–Walter
“Thankfully my teeth seem to have stayed pretty sturdy in my older years.”
–Wanda
The Second-Hand Dentures has a 4.17% chance of being found when digging up a grave and can be traded to the Pig King for 2 Gold Nuggets.
The Second-Hand Dentures can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_10".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Răng giả đã qua sử dụng có 4,17% cơ hội được tìm thấy khi đào mộ và có thể đổi cho Vua Lợn lấy 2 Vàng Thỏi.
